**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 32 — paragraph 4 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

4 b. Member States shall notify the Commission and the other Member States of conformity assessment bodies.
parliament_text: 4 b. Member States shall notify the Commission and the other Member States of conformity assessment bodies.
